---
title: "Phase 5: Multi-Omics Integration"
description: "Unsupervised integration of RNA-seq, ATAC-seq, and pharmacogenomic data using MOFA2 and DIABLO to discover latent metabolizer-associated patterns."
date: 2026-06-10
image: "/images/Phase 5.png"
---

## Overview

Integrated RNA-seq expression, ATAC-seq accessibility, and pharmacogenomic scores using MOFA2 (unsupervised) and DIABLO (supervised) to identify coordinated multi-omic signatures of metabolizer status.

## Key Components

- **MOFA2**: Unsupervised factor discovery across RNA + ATAC modalities
- **DIABLO**: Supervised integration using CYP activity scores as outcome labels
- **Input**: DESeq2-normalized expression matrix, ATAC peak accessibility matrix, CYP2D6/CYP2C19 continuous scores
- **Goal**: Identify latent factors that capture variance explained by pharmacogenomic stratification

## Methods

MOFA2 trained on combined RNA + ATAC matrices with 10 latent factors. Assessed factor-PGx correlation via Spearman's ρ. DIABLO trained with multi-block PLS-DA using continuous CYP scores as Y. Extracted loading weights to identify top contributing genes and peaks per component. Cross-validation via 5-fold CV to assess generalization.

## Deliverables

- [MOFA2/DIABLO scripts](https://github.com/codymgeoffroy/bioinformatics-2026/tree/main/projects/psychpgx/05_integration)
- Factor loading tables (CSV): genes and peaks with top weights
- Factor-PGx correlation heatmaps (PNG)
- Component plots showing sample separation by metabolizer score
- Variance explained per modality (bar plots)

## Results

*(Add figures when complete)*

- MOFA2 factor-PGx correlation matrix (heatmap)
- Scatterplot of MOFA2 Factor 1 vs. CYP2D6 score
- DIABLO component 1 vs. component 2 scatterplot colored by CYP tertiles
- Top 20 genes/peaks per significant factor (bar plots of loadings)
